systems.name: opencode
systems.description: Core agent / session runtime + webapp + TUI

containers.name: Daemon (bun runtime)
containers.description: opencode packages/opencode process serving HTTP + SSE, hosts tool framework + session runloop

containers.name: Webapp (SolidJS SPA)
containers.description: packages/app — question dock, session message rendering

containers.name: TUI (React terminal renderer)
containers.description: packages/opencode cli tui routes — terminal message rendering, question tool block

components.name: Tool framework
components.description: Tool.define wrapper and ToolRegistry; validates args via zod, passes parsed to execute

components.name: Session processor
components.description: AI SDK stream consumer; writes tool part state.input; looks up ToolRegistry on tool-result for normalize

components.name: QuestionDock (webapp)
components.description: Answer prompt dock; imports Question.normalize for defensive rendering

components.name: message-part.tsx question renderer
components.description: Historical tool part rendering in session message list; defensive normalize

components.name: TUI Question component
components.description: Terminal renderer for question tool part; defensive normalize

relationships.description: Processor consults ToolRegistry for tool parameters schema on tool-result
Tool.define wrapper parses args and calls QuestionTool.execute(parsed, ctx)
QuestionTool uses z.preprocess(Question.normalize, ...) and calls Question.ask
Processor safeParse uses schema; the schema's preprocess uses Question.normalize (indirect via CP1->CP3->CP2)
QuestionDock imports Question.normalize for defensive rendering
